'''Napvansa Tadavv''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Sluissi]] who joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and served as an expert [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] on [[Starship/Legends|starships]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Tadavv was on the [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] known as [[StarForge Station]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], when the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Far Orbit]]'' came to the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] looking to take on more crew, she applied for a position.

==Biography==
A [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Sluissi]], Napvansa Tadavv was a skilled [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] and was good at keeping large [[Engine/Legends|engines]] performing. She had a habit of tripling repair [[Time/Legends|time]] estimates so she could beat the deadline and look good.<ref name="Orbit" /> In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{FarOrbitDate}}</ref> Tadavv was on the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] known as [[StarForge Station]], located in the [[StarForge Nebula/Legends|StarForge Nebula]], when the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Far Orbit]]'' arrived after its crew [[Mutiny on the Far Orbit|mutinied]] from under Imperial control. Answering the call for new crew members to staff the [[Frigate/Legends|ship]], which was now a [[Privateer/Legends|privateering]] vessel for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], the Sluissi was one of many who applied for a berth.<ref name="Orbit" />

==Personality and traits==
Tadavv had a thick accent and liked tripling repair times so she looked good when she beat the deadline. She was [[Hair/Legends|hairless]] and, at some point, wore a [[Bandolier/Legends|bandolier]] that had multiple pouches.<ref name="Orbit" />

==Behind the scenes==
Napvansa Tadavv first appeared in ''[[Preparing for War]]'', a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] adventure idea from [[1998]]'s ''[[The Far Orbit Project]]'', by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]]. The book was a supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and was a sequel of sorts to the previous publication ''[[Pirates & Privateers]]'', carrying on that book's theme by following the privateering vessel ''Far Orbit''. Tadavv was provided as a sample character of the people who could apply for berths on the ship. It is up to player discretion as to who receives a job on the ship.
